createnewindustry.ponder.mechanical_cent: Processing Items with the Mechanical Centrifuge
With a Centrifuge and Basin, some Crafting Recipes can be automated
The centrifuge operates only in the correct direction of rotation
Use the engineer's goggles to check if the centrifuge is spinning in the right direction
Some of those recipes may require the heat of a Blaze Burner.
The filter slot can be used in case two recipes are conflicting.
createnewindustry.ponder.flywheel.text_1: A Flywheel cannot generate power on its own. It must first be spun by an external kinetic source.
createnewindustry.ponder.flywheel.text_2: Once spinning, the Flywheel stores kinetic energy and can keep your machines running after the external power source stops.
createnewindustry.ponder.flywheel.text_3: Use Engineer's Goggles to check how much kinetic energy is stored.
createnewindustry.ponder.flywheel.text_4: Without external power, the Flywheel gradually slows down as it releases its stored energy.
createnewindustry.ponder.flywheel.text_5: Higher stress consumption drains the Flywheel faster.
createnewindustry.ponder.flywheel.text_6: Connecting additional Flywheels increases the total stored kinetic energy.
